__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This Main Page was created automatically and it seems it hasn't been replaced yet.
=== For the bureaucrat(s) of this wiki === Hello, and welcome to your new wiki! Thank you for choosing Miraheze for the hosting of your wiki, we hope you will enjoy our hosting.
You can immediately start working on your wiki or whenever you want.
Need help? No problem! We will help you with your wiki as needed. To start, try checking out these helpful links: * [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Help:Contents|MediaWiki guide]] (e.g. navigation, editing, deleting pages, blocking users) * [[meta:Special:MyLanguage/FAQ|Miraheze FAQ]] * [[meta:Special:MyLanguage/Request features|Request settings changes on your wiki]]. (Extensions, Skin and Logo/Favicon changes should be done through [[Special:ManageWiki]] on your wiki, see [[meta:Special:MyLanguage/ManageWiki|ManageWiki]] for more information.)
==== I still don't understand X! ==== Well, that's no problem. Even if something isn't explained in the documentation/FAQ, we are still happy to help you. You can find us here: * [[meta:Special:MyLanguage/Help center|On our own Miraheze wiki]] * On [[phorge:|Phorge]] * On [https://miraheze.org/discord Discord] * On IRC in #miraheze on irc.libera.chat ([irc://irc.libera.chat/%23miraheze direct link]; [https://web.libera.chat/?channel=#miraheze webchat])
=== For visitors of this wiki === Hello, the default Main Page of this wiki (this page) has not yet been replaced by the bureaucrat(s) of this wiki. The bureaucrat(s) might still be working on a Main Page, so please check again later!

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. Our first major goal is to attempt to cover all the [[Beppyo shrine]]s.

=== For the bureaucrat(s) of this wiki === Hello, and welcome to your new wiki! Thank you for choosing Miraheze for the hosting of your wiki, we hope you will enjoy our hosting.
You can immediately start working on your wiki or whenever you want.
Need help? No problem! We will help you with your wiki as needed. To start, try checking out these helpful links: * [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Help:Contents|MediaWiki guide]] (e.g. navigation, editing, deleting pages, blocking users) * [[meta:Special:MyLanguage/FAQ|Miraheze FAQ]] * [[meta:Special:MyLanguage/Request features|Request settings changes on your wiki]]. (Extensions, Skin and Logo/Favicon changes should be done through [[Special:ManageWiki]] on your wiki, see [[meta:Special:MyLanguage/ManageWiki|ManageWiki]] for more information.)
==== I still don't understand X! ==== Well, that's no problem. Even if something isn't explained in the documentation/FAQ, we are still happy to help you. You can find us here: * [[meta:Special:MyLanguage/Help center|On our own Miraheze wiki]] * On [[phorge:|Phorge]] * On [https://miraheze.org/discord Discord] * On IRC in #miraheze on irc.libera.chat ([irc://irc.libera.chat/%23miraheze direct link]; [https://web.libera.chat/?channel=#miraheze webchat])
=== For visitors of this wiki === Hello, the default Main Page of this wiki (this page) has not yet been replaced by the bureaucrat(s) of this wiki. The bureaucrat(s) might still be working on a Main Page, so please check again later! ==Info== Here is some useful information about the wiki and tips for getting started. This page has important
It has [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting. It has {{NUMBEROFFILES}} Images across its pages.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
You can view the main categories here [[:Category:Top level categories]], all imported pages will be present here
Here are some other useful page lists or you can explore all of them here [[Special:SpecialPages]]
==Other Special Pages== * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. It will not have any results immediately after importing from Keep, but it can be very useful later on. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages you didn't do much work on, but if the wiki was converted recently, all pages will have two revisions, due to technical limitations with keep. * [[Special:WantedCategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. After importing this page will not have any entries, but it is useful once you have been using your wiki for a long period * [[Special:UnusedCategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. It might be a good idea to delete these categories to help keep the wiki uncluttered. * [[Special:UncategorizedCategories]] this category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this category [[:Category:Top level categories]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other category and article from that category. * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Due to technical issues with importing they will likely all be tied, but if this wiki is properly imported then the wiki will show them from the last time they were edited on keep. * [[Special:UnusedFiles]] this page lists all images that are not used on an existing page. This will likely be zero at first, but if you remove outdated images from pages, or delete pages this one will fill up. * [[Special:WantedFiles]] this page lists all images that are linked but not uploaded. This normally indicates an error in importing if there are many listed files immediately after import. But if you have been using this wiki for a long time it might instead contain files that you deleted but forgot to remove from pages, or files you linked but forgot to upload

==Special Pages== * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. It will not have any results immediately after importing from Keep, but it can be very useful later on. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:WantedCategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. After importing this page will not have any entries, but it is useful once you have been using your wiki for a long period * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages you didn't do much work on, but if the wiki was converted recently, all pages will have two revisions, due to technical limitations with keep. * [[Special:UnusedCategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. It might be a good idea to delete these categories to help keep the wiki uncluttered. * [[Special:UncategorizedCategories]] this category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this category [[:Category:Top level categories]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other category and article from that category. * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Due to technical issues with importing they will likely all be tied, but if this wiki is properly imported then the wiki will show them from the last time they were edited on keep.

If you are on wikipedia do not cite this wiki, please import the pages to offer attribution.
Unlike wikipedia, we have more instructional content here. But it is not developed yet. To see such articles read from [[:Category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[Category:Instructional articles]]
We have [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins ==Specific tasks to do==
* [[Toshi Hoga]] get a good account of his theory * Remove spurious links to articles we will never have. ** Replace them with english wikipedia links on pages in [[:Category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[Category:Original pages]] or remove them altogether in pages not there. ** Check [[Special:AncientPages]] for them, most pages there will have such spurious links
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:WantedCategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:UnusedCategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:UncategorizedCategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category [[:Category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[Category:Top level categories]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. Our first major goal was to attempt to cover all the [[Beppyo shrine]]s. We have managed to get an article present on every one of them.
If you are on wikipedia do not cite this wiki, please [[:en:Special:Import|import]] the pages to offer attribution.
Unlike wikipedia, we have more instructional content here. But it is not developed yet. To see such articles read from [[:category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[category:Instructional articles]]
We have [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins ==Specific tasks to do==
* [[Toshi Hoga]] get a good account of his theory * [[:category:new pages]] contains pages that have lots of links to Japanese only arrticles. Translate the articles nad put them on this wiki * [[:Category:Original pages|Category:Original page]] * Remove spurious links to articles we will never have. ** Replace them with english wikipedia links on pages in [[:category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[category:Original pages]] or remove them altogether in pages not there. ** Check [[Special:AncientPages]] for them, most pages there will have such spurious links
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this category [[:category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[category:pages from wikipedia11]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other category and article from that category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. Our first major goal was to attempt to cover all the [[Beppyo shrine]]s. We have managed to get an article present on every one of them.
If you are on wikipedia do not cite this wiki, please [[:en:Special:Import|import]] the pages to offer attribution.
Unlike wikipedia, we have more instructional content here. But it is not developed yet. To see such articles read from [[:category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[category:Instructional articles]]
We have [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins ==Specific tasks to do==
* [[Toshi Hoga]] get a good account of his theory * [[:category:new pages]] contains pages that have lots of links to Japanese only arrticles. Translate the articles nad put them on this wiki * [[:Category:Original pages|Category:Original page]] * Remove spurious links to articles we will never have. ** Replace them with english wikipedia links on pages in [[:Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] or remove them altogether in pages not [[category:Original pages]]
** Add links to [[:Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this category [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other category and article from that category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

Translate the articles nad put them on this wiki * [[:Category:Original pages|Category:Original page]] * Remove spurious links to articles we will never have. ** Replace them with english wikipedia links on pages in [[:Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] or remove them altogether in pages not [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] ** Add links to [[:Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this category [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Main Page]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other category and article from that category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. Our first major goal was to attempt to cover all the [[Beppyo shrine]]s. We have managed to get an article present on every one of them.
If you are on wikipedia do not cite this wiki, please [[:en:Special:Import|import]] the pages to offer attribution.
Unlike wikipedia, we have more instructional content here. But it is not developed yet. To see such articles read from [[:Category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[Category:Instructional articles]]
We have [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins ==Specific tasks to do==
* [[Toshi Hoga]] get a good account of his theory * [[:Category:new pages]] contains pages that have lots of links to Japanese only arrticles. Translate the articles nad put them on this wiki * [[:Category:Original pages|Category:Original page]] * Remove spurious links to articles we will never have. ** Replace them with english wikipedia links on pages in [[:Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects with bad categories]][[Category:]] or remove them altogether in pages not ** Add links to [[:Category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] *Fill out a request for ReplaceText at https://meta.miraheze.org/wiki/Steward_requests/Restricted_changes ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category [[Category:kk]][[en:Main Page]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. Our first major goal was to attempt to cover all the [[Beppyo shrine]]s. We have managed to get an article present on every one of them.
If you are on wikipedia do not cite this wiki, please [[:en:Special:Import|import]] the pages to offer attribution.
Unlike wikipedia, we have more instructional content here. But it is not developed yet. To see such articles read from [[:category:Pages that were the oldest for a long time so I am bumping them up the queue for this round]][[category:Instructional articles]]
We have [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins ==Specific tasks to do==
* [[Toshi Hoga]] get a good account of his theory * [[:category:new pages]] contains pages that have lots of links to Japanese only arrticles. Translate the articles nad put them on this wiki * [[:category:Original pages|category:Original page]] * Remove spurious links to articles we will never have. ** Replace them with english wikipedia links on pages in [[:category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[category:Automatic wikipedia redirects with bad categories]][[category:]] or remove them altogether in pages not ** Add links to [[:category:Pages with redlinks to fill]] *Fill out a request for ReplaceText at https://meta.miraheze.org/wiki/Steward_requests/Restricted_changes ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this category [[category:kk]][[en:Main Page]][[category:kk]] [[category:mass bump]] [[category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 4]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other category and article from that category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects with bad categories]] ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category [[Category:kk]][[en:Main Page]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 4]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits

This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
[[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]] ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. __NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. Our first major goal was to attempt to cover all the [[Beppyo shrine]]s. We have managed to get an article present on every one of them.
If you are on wikipedia do not cite this wiki, please [[:en:Special:Import|import]] the pages to offer attribution. [[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]]
We have [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting. Although that page is not working correctly and shows the excessive redirects we have.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins ==Showcase pages== Some of the best articles on this wiki in my view
* [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Hokkaido]]
==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
[[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]] ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category [[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[en:Main Page]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]] [[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]] [[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]][[Category:Pages_to_be_written]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. Our first major goal was to attempt to cover all the [[Beppyo shrine]]s. We have managed to get an article present on every one of them.
If you are on wikipedia do not cite this wiki, please [[:en:Special:Import|import]] the pages to offer attribution. [[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]]
We have [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting. Although that page is not working correctly and shows the excessive [[Category:Pages to be written]]s we have.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins ==Showcase pages== Some of the best articles on this wiki in my view
* [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Hokkaido]]
==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
[[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]] ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category [[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[en:Main Page]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]] [[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]][[Category:Pages to be written]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here [[Special/LonelyPages]] so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. Our first major goal was to attempt to cover all the [[Beppyo shrine]]s. We have managed to get an article present on every one of them.
If you are on wikipedia do not cite this wiki, please [[:en:Special:Import|import]] the pages to offer attribution. [[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]]
We have [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles]] and counting. Although that page is not working correctly and shows the excessive [[Category:Pages to be written 2]]s we have.
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins ==Showcase pages== Some of the best articles on this wiki in my view
* [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Hokkaido]]
==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
[[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]] ==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category [[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[en:Main Page]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]] [[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]] [[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]][[Category:Pages to be written 2]] should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months

The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category [[en:Main Page]]
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. ==Prodecure for "wind down"== Do this after there are no longer siginficant things on the pages above
# Check [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] and delete them # Check [[Special:UnusedCategories]] and delete them # Check [[Special:ListRedirects]] # Make judgment calls on deleting pages from [[Special:LonelyPages]]
Run through this for a few times to let the cycle finish up
==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category [[en:Main Page]]
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[en:Main Page]] [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic

==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic

revision.text:
__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto Shrines.
We have [https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Special:PrefixIndex?prefix=&namespace=0&hideredirects=1&stripprefix=1 {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles] and counting, some 4500 original articles and some 2000 forked [[:Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia|Pages from Wikipedia]].
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins
==Showcase pages== Some of the best articles on this wiki in my view
* [[History of Shinto shrines in Hokkaido]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] ==Message about this wiki== I made most of the pages here, about 4500 as translations of Japanese wikipedia articles. But I got sick of it after doing that many. Which is why I am clearing all the redlinks and am "winding down" the wiki for now. Anyone else who wants to edit, feel free. But I will likely not be making many new pages in a while[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:12, 3 April 2025 (UTC)
==Update== Bot is complete. It appears that [[Special:WantedPages]] is completely empty aside from a few straggler pages that should simply be made into redirects. [[Special:WantedCategories]] is a bit more difficult. But I think we can use the bot to clear all of them too
Lets hope this "wind down" is successful.
To be finished we still have [[:Category:pages to be translated]] but it is pretty much all dates and Shikinaisha lists. Nothing challenging.
==Procedure for "wind down"== Do this after there are no longer significant things on the pages above
# Check [[Special:WantedPages]] to make sure there are none still there. # Check [[Special:WantedCategories]] and create each category # Check [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] and delete them # Check [[Special:UnusedCategories]] and delete them # Check [[Special:ListRedirects]] # Make judgment calls on deleting pages from [[Special:LonelyPages]]
Run through this for a few times to let the cycle finish up
==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == No need for cewbot for now, since pages are made to be easily imported
fix all the gods names to have honorifics
Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

}}

This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto Shrines.
We have [https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Special:PrefixIndex?prefix=&namespace=0&hideredirects=1&stripprefix=1 {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles] and counting, some 4500 original articles and some [[:Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia|2000 forked]] .
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins
==Showcase pages== Some of the best articles on this wiki in my view
* [[History of Shinto shrines in Hokkaido]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] ==Message about this wiki== I made most of the pages here, about 4500 as translations of Japanese wikipedia articles. But I got sick of it after doing that many. Which is why I am clearing all the redlinks and am "winding down" the wiki for now. Anyone else who wants to edit, feel free. But I will likely not be making many new pages in a while[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:12, 3 April 2025 (UTC)
==Update== Bot is complete. It appears that [[Special:WantedPages]] is completely empty aside from a few straggler pages that should simply be made into redirects. [[Special:WantedCategories]] is a bit more difficult. But I think we can use the bot to clear all of them too
Lets hope this "wind down" is successful.
To be finished we still have
but it is pretty much all dates and Shikinaisha lists. Nothing challenging.
==Procedure for "wind down"== Do this after there are no longer significant things on the pages above
# Check [[Special:WantedPages]] to make sure there are none still there. # Check [[Special:WantedCategories]] and create each category # Check [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] and delete them # Check [[Special:UnusedCategories]] and delete them # Check [[Special:ListRedirects]] # Make judgment calls on deleting pages from [[Special:LonelyPages]]
Run through this for a few times to let the cycle finish up
==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic

revision.comment: Bot: classify by valid enwiki interwikis
revision.text:
__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto Shrines.
We have [https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Special:PrefixIndex?prefix=&namespace=0&hideredirects=1&stripprefix=1 {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles] and counting, some 4500 original articles and some [[:Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia|2000 forked]] .
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins
==Showcase pages== Some of the best articles on this wiki in my view
* [[History of Shinto shrines in Hokkaido]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] ==Message about this wiki== Using bots i have established that there are now no duplicate pages every page has its history and I’m removing unnecessary ills like my own cewbot
==Update== Bot is complete. It appears that [[Special:WantedPages]] is completely empty aside from a few straggler pages that should simply be made into redirects. [[Special:WantedCategories]] is a bit more difficult. But I think we can use the bot to clear all of them too
Lets hope this "wind down" is successful.
To be finished we still have
but it is pretty much all dates and Shikinaisha lists. Nothing challenging.
==Procedure for "wind down"== Do this after there are no longer significant things on the pages above
# Check [[Special:WantedPages]] to make sure there are none still there. # Check [[Special:WantedCategories]] and create each category # Check [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] and delete them # Check [[Special:UnusedCategories]] and delete them # Check [[Special:ListRedirects]] # Make judgment calls on deleting pages from [[Special:LonelyPages]]
Run through this for a few times to let the cycle finish up
==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn

__NOTOC__ == Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! == This wiki is dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto Shrines.
We have [https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Special:PrefixIndex?prefix=&namespace=0&hideredirects=1&stripprefix=1 {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles] and counting, some 4500 original articles and some [[:Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia|2000 forked]] .
If you want to look at the pages that went the longest without being edited, you can view them [[Special:AncientPages|here]] which is useful for updating outdated pages
There are {{NUMBEROFPAGES}} pages including non article pages
There are {{NUMBEROFEDITS}} edits
There are {{NUMBEROFUSERS}} total users, of which {{NUMBEROFACTIVEUSERS}} are active
There are {{NUMBEROFADMINS}} admins
==Showcase pages== Some of the best articles on this wiki in my view
* [[History of Shinto shrines in Hokkaido]] * [[History of Shinto shrines in Okinawa]] ==Message about this wiki== Using bots i have established that there are now no duplicate pages every page has its history and I’m removing unnecessary ills like my own cewbot
==Update== Bot is complete. It appears that [[Special:WantedPages]] is completely empty aside from a few straggler pages that should simply be made into redirects. [[Special:WantedCategories]] is a bit more difficult. But I think we can use the bot to clear all of them too
Lets hope this "wind down" is successful.
To be finished we still have
but it is pretty much all dates and Shikinaisha lists. Nothing challenging.
==Procedure for "wind down"== Do this after there are no longer significant things on the pages above
# Check [[Special:WantedPages]] to make sure there are none still there. # Check [[Special:WantedCategories]] and create each category # Check [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] and delete them # Check [[Special:UnusedCategories]] and delete them # Check [[Special:ListRedirects]] # Make judgment calls on deleting pages from [[Special:LonelyPages]]
Run through this for a few times to let the cycle finish up
==Specific tasks to do== This wiki is as it stands right now a project of translating Japanese wikipedia articles into english and enhancing them if necessary. This only covers shinto and shinto related articles and only ones that would be notable on english wikipedia
This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic

This is an intrinsically finite project. Probably all necessary articles have been added already and the article count will only go down from now on. The project will likely be completed in a few months
==Special Pages== Most of these are cached and not up to date but after about a week from Dec 9 2024 they will likely provide useful info again * [[Special:WantedPages]] This page tracks all pages with links to them that do not exist. The more links to a page that does not exist the higher it will be on this list, so linking a page that does not exist can be a useful editing strategy to track what you need to write next. * [[Special:Wantedcategories]] This page shows all categories that do not exist but have member pages. * [[Special:WantedTemplates]] for templates not imported yet * [[Special:ShortPages]] this page lists the shortest pages on the wiki. This can be useful for seeing pages that had the least work put into them, especially immediately after importing. But some pages do not need to be very long. If you want another tool see the next entry * [[Special:FewestRevisions]] Useful for finding neglected pages we didn't do much work on. But this will be more useful after a year or more of usage when the wiki has a lot of pages. Some pages lack revision history due to importing related history early on on the wiki's existence * [[Special:Unusedcategories]] this page lists all categories that have no members. All such categories should be deleted * [[Special:Uncategorizedcategories]] this Category covers all categories that are not in other categories. Ideally this Category
should be the only one present. This means you can find every other Category and article from that Category. * [[Special:UncategorizedPages]] * [[Special:AncientPages]] as mentioned earlier in the intro. This page shows all pages by their most recent edit. Once the cache is cleared it should show pages that need ediing or otherwise. * [[Special:LonelyPages]] for finding pages without links to them. I pasted them here Special/LonelyPages so that place has all the pages I want to keep. Other pages should be deleted if off topic
== To do with bots == Fix nihon-shiki to hepburn
